videos.headline: Alabama's Harris hurdles defender for 53-yard gain
videos.description: Najee Harris takes the handoff and hurdles a defender along the sideline to pick up 53 yards and an Alabama first down.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Alabama's Harris hurdles defender for 53-yard gain) 2021/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Smith makes multiple defenders miss to put Alabama on the board
videos.description: DeVonta Smith makes the catch and shakes off a few defenders en route to a 26-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Smith makes multiple defenders miss to put Alabama on the board) 2021/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jones finds Billingsley wide open for another Bama TD
videos.description: Mac Jones fakes a handoff and finds a wide-open Jahleel Billingsley for an Alabama touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jones finds Billingsley wide open for another Bama TD) 2021/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Notre Dame's Williams plows into end zone on fourth-and-goal
videos.description: Notre Dame goes for it on fourth-and-goal with Kyren Williams bulldozing into end zone for a short touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Notre Dame's Williams plows into end zone on fourth-and-goal) 2021/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Smith speeds away from defense for 34-yard TD
videos.description: DeVonta Smith hauls in the pass and goes right by the Notre Dame defense for a 34-yard touchdown catch.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Smith speeds away from defense for 34-yard TD) 2021/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Bama's Christian Harris jumps in front of Book's intended target for INT
videos.description: Notre Dame QB Ian Book tries to find TE Michael Mayer, but Alabama LB Christian Harris jumps in front for the interception.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bama's Christian Harris jumps in front of Book's intended target for INT) 2021/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: DeVonta Smith toe drags for third TD catch of the day
videos.description: Mac Jones rushes to his right and flings it to DeVonta Smith in the end zone, who just gets his feet down for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (DeVonta Smith toe drags for third TD catch of the day) 2021/01/01 ESHEET
